occupation: Managing Director at Kena Outdoor ZA
headline: Managing Director | Kena Outdoor | Marketing, Media & Growth Leader | Driving Commercial Performance, OOH Transformation & Revenue Growth
summary: My career has been shaped by experience of marketing, media, digital platforms, and business strategy with a consistent focus on driving growth, scaling consumer platforms, and translating strategy into measurable revenue performance. I’ve worked across leading organisations including Vodacom Financial Services, SuperSport, VML, Publicis Groupe, Dentsu, and Mindshare, partnering with some of the world’s most recognised brands. This experience spans telecommunications, financial services, media, sports, automotive, and FMCG giving me a deep understanding of how brands, platforms, and consumer ecosystems connect. As Managing Director of Kena Outdoor, my focus is on building a modern, high-performance out-of-home media business, driving commercial growth, strengthening operational discipline, and transforming the business towards a more digital, data-led future. My experience spans:  Commercial strategy and revenue growth  Digital and connected commerce ecosystems  Consumer acquisition and lifecycle value  Media, platform, and data-led marketing  Business and marketing transformation  Strategic partnerships and revenue models Cross functional team and people management I’ve led cross-functional teams, managed significant marketing and media investments, and partnered closely with executive leadership to drive business performance at scale. I believe sustainable growth sits at the intersection of strong commercial fundamentals, operational excellence, and a deep understanding of how consumers engage with brands in the real world.
location_str: City of Johannesburg, Gauteng, South Africa

experiences.title: Managing Director
experiences.description:
Leading the overall performance, growth, and strategic direction of Kena Outdoor, with a mandate to build a commercially disciplined, high-performance out-of-home media business.

Key Responsibilities:

Commercial Leadership & Growth

Driving revenue growth and profitability across the business
Leading sales strategy, pipeline development, and key account expansion (agencies and direct clients)
Unlocking new revenue streams across digital OOH, airports, forecourts, and strategic partnerships

Business Transformation

Transitioning the business from a static-heavy model to a digital-first OOH network
Expanding into high-value environments and strategic infrastructure
Positioning Kena Outdoor as a top-tier OOH player in South Africa

Operations & Asset Performance

Overseeing the full asset lifecycle: site acquisition, development, maintenance, and monetisation
Driving occupancy, uptime, and operational efficiency across the portfolio
Improving turnaround times and delivery across production and execution

Financial Leadership

Delivering EBITDA growth and enforcing cost discipline
Strengthening cash flow, collections, and financial governance
Implementing robust budgeting, forecasting, and reporting frameworks

Governance & Stakeholder Management

Ensuring compliance across municipal bylaws, lease agreements, and regulatory frameworks
Managing key stakeholder relationships across municipalities, landlords, regulators, and partners

Leadership & Culture

Leading and developing a high-performance executive team (Sales, Operations, Finance)
Driving accountability, execution discipline, and a results-oriented culture
Building a scalable organisation aligned to growth and performance

experiences.title: Consumer Product Marketing Lead
experiences.description:
Lead the marketing strategy for consumer financial services products within the Vodacom ecosystem, driving adoption, engagement and revenue growth across digital platforms.

Key areas of responsibility:

• Developing integrated marketing strategies for consumer financial services products
• Driving digital customer acquisition and lifecycle growth
• Leading cross-functional collaboration across product, commercial, media and technology teams
• Managing marketing investment and performance optimisation across digital channels
• Translating consumer insights and behavioural data into growth strategies

Impact areas:

• Consumer product adoption
• Customer growth and engagement
• Revenue expansion
• Digital platform performance
experiences.location: City of Johannesburg, Gauteng, South Africa

experiences.title: Head of Media
experiences.description:
Led media strategy and performance for major consumer brands, overseeing integrated media planning, investment strategy and digital transformation initiatives.

Responsibilities included:

• Leading cross-channel media strategy across digital, social, performance and traditional channels
• Managing large scale media investment and optimisation frameworks
• Partnering with client leadership teams to align media strategy with business growth objectives
• Driving innovation in data-led marketing and audience strategy

experiences.title: Senior Digital Marketing Lead
experiences.description:

Focus areas included:

• Digital audience growth and fan engagement
• Social media strategy and platform optimisation
• Integrated marketing campaigns for major sporting events

experiences.title: Strategic Client Director
experiences.description:
Led strategic client partnerships and commercial growth initiatives, advising major brands on digital marketing transformation, performance strategy and consumer growth.

Key responsibilities included:

• Leading executive-level client relationships and strategic advisory engagements
• Developing integrated marketing and digital transformation strategies aligned with business growth objectives
• Driving revenue expansion through strategic consulting, performance marketing and platform innovation
• Overseeing cross-functional teams across media, strategy, technology and analytics
• Identifying new commercial opportunities and expanding long-term client partnerships

Impact areas:

• Revenue growth across key client portfolios
• Strategic marketing transformation programmes
• Digital platform and performance marketing strategy
• Long-term commercial partnerships with major brands

experiences.title: Head Of Digital Media - Absa
experiences.description:
Led media strategy, investment and performance across major consumer brands, driving integrated media ecosystems that delivered measurable business outcomes.

Responsible for overseeing media planning, investment strategy and performance optimisation across digital, social and traditional channels.

Key responsibilities:

• Developing integrated media strategies aligned with brand and commercial objectives
• Managing large-scale media investment across multiple consumer brands
• Leading cross-channel media planning across digital, social, programmatic and traditional platforms
• Driving data-led marketing and audience strategy to improve campaign performance
• Building and leading high-performing media teams across strategy, planning and optimisation
• Partnering with senior client stakeholders to align media strategy with business growth goals

Impact areas:

• Media investment optimisation
• Audience growth and engagement
• Marketing ROI improvement
• Integrated brand and performance media strategy

experiences.title: Digital Lead - Samsung
experiences.description:
Responsible for managing digital media strategy and ensuring client satisfaction through delivery of appropriate strategies, excellent service and all media objectives. The Digital Lead strategist is responsible for managing digital media strategy and implementation on an account or portfolio of accounts.

Internally, they are responsible for:
•	Managing the digital team on the account/portfolio
•	The profitability of on the account/portfolio.  
•	Ensuring the integration and process flow throughout planning, booking and implementation.

experiences.title: Digital Social Lead - Unilever, MTN, KFC, Multichoice, JLR + Various
experiences.description:
As Social Media Lead my position consists of both the digital department and for clients handlings. From a client perspective the role focuses on developing relationships with specific clients and assisting them in driving innovation in the social space and achieving their marketing KPI’s.

From the digital team perspective, the role is managerial, ensuring that the social team works well together, that quality is maintained and that the team has the right resources and training to do their job to the best of their ability, while assisting the bigger team too.

Key clients include: Unilever, KFC, MTN, Jaguar, Land Rover, Lucozade, Kelloggs, Nike, Mazda
